'''Isiring''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Cassander sector/Legends|Cassander sector]]. An [[Ore/Legends|ore]]-rich [[Mining/Legends|mining]] world, Isiring became a part of the domain known as the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]], founded by the former businessman [[Cassander Tadrin]] during the reign of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] later divided the domain into [[Sector/Legends|subsectors]], Isiring became the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Tendrannan sector/Legends|Tendrannan sector]]. The world was subsequently a part of the [[Pentastar Alignment]] and the [[Imperial Remnant]].

==Description==
Isiring was an [[Ore/Legends|ore]]-rich [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE Isiring">{{CSWECite|II|119|Isiring}}</ref> located in the [[Isiring system/Legends|Isiring system]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was a part of the [[Star cluster/Legends|star cluster]]<ref name="CSWE Cassandran">{{CSWECite|I|111|Cassandran Worlds}}</ref> that eventually became the [[Tendrannan sector/Legends|Tendrannan sector]], a [[Sector/Legends|subsector]] of the [[Cassander sector/Legends|Cassander sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Isiring was situated on the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant Run]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], which connected it to the [[New Bakstre system/Legends|New Bakstre system]] as well as the [[Vuchelle system/Legends|Vuchelle system]] of the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]].<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
A [[Standard century/Legends|century]] before<ref name="GatORW" /> the [[Declaration of a New Order|disestablishment]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the former businessman [[Cassander Tadrin]] led the [[Colonist/Legends|colonization]] of the domain that became known as the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]]. Over the subsequent [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]], the domain grew to include more than a hundred worlds, including Isiring.<ref name="GatORW" />

When the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took over the Cassandran Worlds shortly before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the domain was divided into three<ref name="GatORW" /> subsectors,<ref name="EAOC" /> including the Tendrannan sector, with Isiring becoming its [[Capital/Legends|capital]].<ref name="CSWE Isiring" /> Between [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] and [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]], Isiring was situated in the territory of the [[Pentastar Alignment]],<ref name="TEA" /> and it fell within the borders of the [[Imperial Remnant]] between 12 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
Isiring was first mentioned in the [[2004]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] sourcebook ''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''.<ref name="GatORW" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Isiring [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Isiring itself, in grid square L-5.<ref name="TEA" />
